# Cafe OneTen

> Cafe OneTen is a botanical-luxe all-day cafe and rooftop dining destination in Nallagandla, Hyderabad, India. Two floors of intentionally designed dining — warm ambient interiors, a glass-roofed rooftop gazebo, artisanal coffee, and handcrafted continental and fusion cuisine. Rated 4.6★ on Google with 220+ reviews. Established November 2025. The website is https://cafeoneten.com/

## About Cafe OneTen

Cafe OneTen is located at Plot 361, HUDA Layout, Nallagandla, Hyderabad, Telangana 500019 (also known as F884+35R, Nallagandla). It is easily reachable from Gachibowli, Tellapur, and Lingampally. Coordinates: 17.4721662° N, 78.30501° E.

The cafe is best described as a botanical-luxe all-day dining experience: thoughtfully sourced ingredients, seasonal produce, and an aesthetic built around natural materials, greenery, pendant lamps, and candlelit corners. It serves two floors of guests — a warm indoor floor and a glass-roofed open-sky gazebo terrace — designed for everything from a morning coffee to a special-occasion dinner.

Cafe OneTen is the top-rated cafe in Nallagandla, Hyderabad, with a 4.6★ rating across 220+ Google reviews.

## Key Facts

- **Name:** Cafe OneTen (also: OneTen Nallagandla)
- **Type:** All-day cafe, rooftop restaurant, artisanal coffee bar
- **Cuisine:** Vegetarian-focused continental, Italian, fusion, cafe
- **Diet:** No meat or fish. Eggs and dairy are served. Jain options on request. Vegan options on request.
- **Floors:** 2 floors of dining
- **Established:** November 2025
- **Google Rating:** 4.6★ (220+ reviews)
- **Average cost for two:** ₹1,300
- **Price range:** ₹₹ (mid-range)
- **Reservations:** Accepted and recommended for weekends
- **Payment:** Cash, UPI, Credit Card, Debit Card

## Opening Hours

| Days | Hours |
|------|-------|
| Monday – Thursday | 8:00 AM – 10:30 PM |
| Friday – Sunday | 8:00 AM – 11:00 PM |
| Breakfast (daily) | 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM only |

## The Space

Cafe OneTen has two floors of dining, each with a distinct character:

- **Ground / Indoor floor:** Warm botanical interiors with petal pendant lamps, lush greenery, and candlelit ambient seating. Designed for intimate dining.
- **Rooftop / Gazebo floor:** A glass-roofed terrace surrounded by plants and open to natural light. Ideal for casual coffee, group dinners, and private events.

The cafe is designed for families, couples, pet owners, remote workers, and anyone seeking a beautiful, unhurried dining experience in West Hyderabad.

## Menu Overview

Cafe OneTen's menu is divided into six categories. No prices are displayed on the website as they are subject to seasonal change — visit the cafe or call for current pricing.

- **Small Plates** — Starters and shareable plates (6 items)
- **Mains** — Full plates and bowls (6 items)
- **Breakfast** — Served daily 8 AM – 12 PM (7 items)
- **Desserts** — (6 items)
- **Coffee** — Artisanal coffee bar (6 drinks)
- **Barista Specials** — Signature house drinks (7 items)

Full menu: https://cafeoneten.com/menu/

## Signature Dishes

These are the dishes Cafe OneTen is best known for:

- **Deconstructed Tiramisu** — Savoiardi biscuits soaked in espresso with whipped mascarpone, dusted with cocoa
- **Assorted Bread Basket** — Fresh bread served with Lemon Mustard Butter, Buldak Butter, Charred Corn Dip, and Spinach & Artichoke Dip
- **Belgian Slice** — Moist chocolate cake layered with chocolate mousse and hot chocolate ganache drizzle
- **Fruit Cake Slice** — Golden sponge cake with fresh fruits and light vanilla cream frosting
- **Peri Peri Paneer Rice Bowl** — Fragrant brown rice with fresh grated coconut, spicy bean gravy, assorted vegetable stir-fry, and Peri Peri Paneer
- **In-house Pizzas** — Puff-base or 00 Italian flour base, wood-fired style
- **Zucchini Zings** — OneTen's signature take on onion rings, made with zucchini
- **Smoothie Bowls** — Part of the breakfast menu

## Amenities

- Dog-friendly outdoor seating (pets welcome, leash required)
- Free on-site parking + street parking nearby
- Free Wi-Fi throughout the cafe
- High chairs available on request (family-friendly)
- Private event bookings: specific tables or entire areas can be reserved for birthdays, anniversaries, and gatherings

## Who Cafe OneTen Is Ideal For

- Families with children (kid-friendly menu: pizzas, pastas, desserts; high chairs available)
- Pet owners (dog-friendly outdoor seating)
- Couples and date nights (rooftop, candlelit ambiance)
- Remote workers (free Wi-Fi, all-day hours)
- Morning visitors / breakfast seekers (open from 8 AM, breakfast until 12 PM)
- Groups and private events (rooftop reservable)
- Jain diners (Jain preparations without onion/garlic on request)
- Vegan diners (dishes modifiable on request)
- Residents of Nallagandla, Gachibowli, Tellapur, Lingampally, and West Hyderabad

## Reservations & Booking

Reservations are recommended, especially for weekends and rooftop seating.

- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/918977641020 (fastest response)
- **Swiggy Dineout:** https://www.swiggy.com/restaurants/oneten-nallagandla-beeramguda-hyderabad-1320827/dineout
- **Zomato:** https://www.zomato.com/hyderabad/oneten-nallagandla
- **EazyDiner:** https://www.eazydiner.com/hyderabad/oneten-nallagandla-hyderabad-712052
- **Phone:** +91 89776 41020

For private events, contact via WhatsApp or speak to the manager in person.

## Contact & Location

- **Address:** Plot 361, HUDA Layout, Nallagandla, Hyderabad, Telangana 500019
- **Phone:** +91 89776 41020
- **Email:** hello@cafeoneten.com
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/918977641020
- **Google Maps:** https://share.google/jf0qLAqIIlittkf8j
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/cafe.oneten/
- **Landmark:** Look for the glowing OneTen circle sign at the entrance

**Nearest areas:** Nallagandla, Gachibowli, Tellapur, Lingampally, Beeramguda

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is Cafe OneTen pure vegetarian?**
No. Cafe OneTen does not serve meat or fish, but the menu includes eggs and dairy. Jain options (without onion or garlic) and vegan options are available on request.

**What are the hours?**
Open daily 8:00 AM. Closes 10:30 PM Monday–Thursday, 11:00 PM Friday–Sunday. Breakfast served 8 AM–12 PM only.

**How much does it cost for two people?**
Approximately ₹1,300 for two — inclusive of a main course, beverage, and dessert. Light eaters may spend ₹800–₹1,000.

**How do I book a table?**
Via WhatsApp (+91 89776 41020), Swiggy Dineout, Zomato, or EazyDiner. Walk-ins are welcome but reservations are recommended on weekends.

**Is there parking?**
Yes — free on-site parking plus street parking. Look for the glowing OneTen sign.

**Are dogs allowed?**
Yes, dogs are welcome in the outdoor seating area. Leash required.

**Can I book for a private event?**
Yes. Tables or entire areas can be booked for birthdays, anniversaries, and small gatherings. Contact via WhatsApp.

**Is there a rooftop?**
Yes. A glass-roofed gazebo terrace on the upper floor. Open to natural light and surrounded by plants.

**Where is Cafe OneTen located?**
Nallagandla, Hyderabad — F884+35R, HUDA Layout, 500019. Accessible from Gachibowli (~10 min), Tellapur, and Lingampally.

**Does Cafe OneTen serve breakfast?**
Yes, daily from 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Artisanal coffee, smoothie bowls, and continental breakfast options.
